content: The open-ended exploratory search structure of incomplete findings for Topic A and Topic B, which mimics how agents iteratively query uninformative memory regions, can be formalized into a new curiosity-driven active memory retrieval mechanism for 2024-2025 SOTA agent architectures. This mechanism treats unindexed, partially explored memory slots (the incomplete `【搜索发现】` entries in both topics) as high-value curiosity targets instead of ignoring them as noise.
